title: US-Iran ceasefire narrative vs. physical evidence — May 9 2026
narrative: Trump administration claims the Iran ceasefire is "still in effect" while striking Iranian tankers. Pentagon/CENTCOM statements say attacks are "defensive" and "proportionate." State Dept frames tanker strikes as enforcing blockade legally. Marco Rubio demands Iran give "immediate response." Shell CEO says 12% of global crude is off the market.
telemetry: CENTCOM: USS Spruance disabled Iranian tanker Touska by firing into its engine room — not "defensive patrol"
Vessels transiting Strait of Hormuz report being hit by Iranian gunfire — physical evidence strait is NOT passable
ADS-B/satellite trackable evidence: zero vessels broke through US blockade since Monday per CENTCOM
Maersk CEO: Iran war causing $500M/month in extra shipping costs; shares dropping sharply
Shell CEO on record: "hard reality of taking 12% of the world's crude off the market" — energy impact severe
13 US troops killed, 381 wounded in 40 days of Operation Epic Fury — not reflected in official "peace talks" framing
Ukraine intel: Russia providing Iran cyber support and spy satellite imagery of US military facilities
CNBC headline: "US economy showing no signs of pain" — but Maersk, Shell, oil markets show massive disruption
analysis:
Official sources say one thing. The evidence says another. Administration uses ceasefire as PR armor while conducting active naval warfare. Shell and Maersk financial disclosures independently corroborate the strait is functionally closed — directly contradicting blockade is working spin. Frame: officials say peace while physical evidence (tanker damage, troop casualties, shipping disruption, energy market data) shows active war with no defined end state.

• CENTCOM: USS Spruance disabled Iranian tanker Touska by firing into its engine room — not "defensive patrol"
• Vessels transiting Strait of Hormuz report being hit by Iranian gunfire — physical evidence strait is NOT passable
• ADS-B/satellite trackable evidence: zero vessels broke through US blockade since Monday per CENTCOM
• Maersk CEO: Iran war causing $500M/month in extra shipping costs; shares dropping sharply

The pattern in the telemetry — 8 independent data points — points in a consistent direction that the official narrative does not acknowledge. When the official framing and the physical evidence are in contradiction, the evidence is the more reliable signal. The gap between what officials claim and what the data shows is the story.
verdict: [SIPHONED VERDICT]: Administration uses "ceasefire" as PR armor while conducting active naval warfare. Shell and Maersk financial disclosures independently corroborate the strait is functionally closed — directly contrad
